rows: Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

Born Philip Știrbei in 1960 to a middle class family in the suburbs of Detroit. By his mid 20s he'd fallen in with a bad element but also attracted the eye of Lazlo Perun, who believed him to carry the blood of the extinct Danislav revenant family. Before Lazlo could begin the extend process of the proper Tzimisce embrace, Philip was embraced by the surging mid-west Anarch faction, by a Brujah called "Carwash." Philip, now calling himself by his gang name "Fabian" struggled under the yoke of the Anarchs laissez faire doctrine. Noting the issue, Lazli appeared to him and presented him with the option to take the tougher road of faith with the chance for a better future. "Fabian" agreed, and with the help of Lazlo and his revanents, murder the Anarch gang in their sleep. Lazlo taught Philip the ways of the Tzimisce and the Order of St Blaise. When ready he brought him into the Path of Cathari. Upon becoming True Sabbat and on the path, he took the name Isiah. Ready to set his charge free, Lazlo campaigned to have his charge added to the new pack comprised of members of Scbhwartze Sonne and Carrion Crafts. Isiah would spend his time split with the Pack and working undercover with Anarchs around the county. When the call was made to move to LA, Isiah stepped up to act as priest, while the previous title-holder remained with the rest of the pack in the Mid-West. As a blessing, Lazlo provided Isiah with his bound Grimaldi.

Equipment:
Revolver (Mid Caliber)
Semi-automatic Handgun (Common) 
Armored T-Shirt
